description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a striking metallic blue exterior. The front features aggressive, angular headlights and a vented hood, with a prominent emblem at the center. The side view reveals sculpted body lines, blacked-out windows, and large, black alloy wheels with red brake calipers, emphasizing its sporty character. The rear showcases dual exhausts, sharp taillights, and a subtle integrated spoiler, with a visible license plate area. The roof is black, contrasting with the blue body, and the car has two doors, typical of a coupe. The overall design is modern, muscular, and built for speed, with a focus on both aesthetics and aerodynamics.
description: A metallic blue, low-profile sports car with black alloy wheels, sculpted body lines, and aggressive front and rear styling. The car features a black roof, two doors, and a modern, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing angular headlights, vented hood, and central emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting sculpted body lines, black roof, and large black alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying sharp taillights, dual exhausts, integrated spoiler, and license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the coupe profile and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: black five-spoke alloy wheels with split-spoke design and red brake calipers
